mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id, token_hash, expires_at, created_at, revoked_at FROM refresh_tokens WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND revoked_at IS NULL AND expires_at > #{now}
mapper.update: UPDATE refresh_tokens SET revoked_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND revoked_at IS NULL
UPDATE refresh_tokens SET revoked_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND revoked_at IS NULL
